about.title: Introduction
about.desc: VITA AWARD is the Vietnam Tourism Award hosted by Vietnam Travel Magazine, in coordination with agencies and strategic partners.
about.vision_desc1: To become the iconic award of Vietnam's tourism industry in the new era — a place to honor outstanding values, promote digital transformation & green tourism, and spread the inspiration to explore Vietnam.
about.vision_desc2: Connecting businesses, destinations, and the tourism community on a modern, culturally rich digital media platform.
about.card1_desc: Outstanding organizations, enterprises, localities, and individuals of the industry.
about.card2_desc: High-quality, creative, and sustainable tourism development models.
about.card3_desc: The image of modern, culturally rich Vietnam tourism to the community.
about.card4_desc: The tourism community on a multi-channel digital media platform.

vote.title: Voting
vote.desc: Each of your votes is a worthy recognition for the unremitting efforts of the Vietnam tourism industry.

results.title: Live
results.desc: Voting results are updated in real-time. The Gala night on Jul 09, 2026, will announce the official winners.
results.updated: Last updated: a few seconds ago

news.title: VITA Award
news.desc: Latest updates on the season, accompanying events, and inspiring stories.

events.title: VITA Award 2025
events.desc: The official roadmap of the season — from nominations launch to the Gala night.

sponsors.title: Sponsors
sponsors.desc: Thank you to our partners for accompanying VITA Award 2025 in the journey to honor Vietnam's tourism industry.
sponsors.sponsor_desc: Accompany the journey to honor Vietnam's tourism industry

footer.desc: Vietnam Tourism Awards 2025 — Honoring values, connecting the future.
footer.copyright: © 2025 VITA Award. All rights reserved. · Designed with ❤️ for Vietnamese Tourism

auth.desc_login: Welcome back! Login to continue voting.
auth.desc_register: Create an account to participate in voting for nominees.
auth.change_pass_desc: Please enter your current password and new password.
auth.err_same_pass: New password must be different from the current one!
auth.change_success_desc: Your account password has been safely updated.
auth.toast_vote_success: Vote successful! Thank you for participating.
